The '''XXt-26 S-thread tracker''' was a [[Homing beacon/Legends|homing beacon]] manufactured by [[Neuro-Saav Technologies/Legends|Neuro-Saav Technologies]]. Its narrow-beam [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] [[Hyperspace transponder|transponder]] signal was configured to blend into the "background noise" caused by drive emissions, making it virtually undetectable except for dedicated scanners.<ref name="EGWT" />

[[IG-88B/Legends|IG-88B]] hid two of these scanners aboard [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett's]] [[Starship/Legends|starship]], [[Slave I/Legends|''Slave I'']].<ref name="EGWT" /> [[IG-88C/Legends|IG-88C]] and [[IG-88D/Legends|IG-88D]] tracked the ship to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] and sought to steal the [[Carbonite/Legends|carbonite]]-encased [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], but Fett outsmarted the assassin droids and claimed [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt's]] bounty on Solo.<ref name="Tale of IG-88">{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}</ref>

{{Tech-stub}}
